sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince optimal f method: K = E / (W / -f). Recalculate daily as equity changes. Requires prior parametric analysis to determine optimal f from worst-case P&L across historical backtest. Number of contracts = current equity / (worst P&L / negative optimal f).

source_rule_text: Calculate the number of contracts to trade by dividing current account equity by the quotient of worst-case P&L divided by negative optimal f value
